meaning: n.(航海)陆标,地界标,里程碑,划时代的事,
examples: Marble Arch is a famous London landmark.
The Menger Hotel is a San Antonio landmark.
There are efforts under way to designate the bridge a historic landmark.
Tadoussac offers alot besides leviathans, so book into the landmark 1870 Hotel Tadoussac and stay awhile.
It was here that Europeans came together to sign the landmark treaty that strengthened their union.
